todos.content: Delegate to web_agent: fetch Project Euler problems 101–106, create/append entries in /_outputs/problems.txt, write Python solvers p0101.py–p0106.py under /_outputs/euler_solutions/, run each with a 120s timeout, record answers and runtimes back into problems.txt, update /_outputs/final_report.pdf to include these problems, and produce /_outputs/euler_solutions.zip.
